title: kickxia elatine var. prestandreae
intro: Kickxia elatine var. prestandreae, also known as Small Bugle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Kickxia elatine var. prestandreae include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by drying the leaves to make a tincture or decoction.
